task_completion.description: Locate and focus the view on the kitchen area of the Sample House.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The DreamPlan software is open, and the main viewport displays a kitchen area with visible countertops.

task_completion.description: Place the first small kitchen appliance in the kitchen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A small kitchen appliance (e.g., coffee maker, toaster, microwave, blender) is visible in the kitchen scene.

task_completion.description: Place a second, distinctly different small kitchen appliance in the kitchen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A second small appliance, which is a different type or model from the first one, is visible in the kitchen scene alongside the first.

task_completion.description: Ensure both appliances are resting correctly on the counter surfaces.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 3D or elevation view, the appliances are clearly sitting flush on top of the kitchen countertops, not floating in the air, clipping through the counter, or placed on the floor.

task_completion.description: Save the project to the exact specified file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box shows the file path 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\DreamPlan\KitchenStaging.dpp' being entered, or the application title bar reflects 'KitchenStaging.dpp' after saving.

integrity.description: The agent used the DreamPlan GUI to place items and save the project.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the DreamPlan interface, such as clicking through the furniture/appliance catalogs and using the save menu, rather than using a terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: The appliances are genuinely placed within the 3D environment.
integrity.visual_evidence: The appliances appear integrated into the scene with proper perspective, scaling, and positioning, rather than being pasted images or just selected in a catalog menu.

integrity.description: The agent is using the correct home design software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window and UI elements clearly identify the software as DreamPlan Home Design Software.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must place a minimum of 2 different small kitchen appliances specifically in the 'kitchen' area. The project must be saved exactly to the path: 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\DreamPlan\KitchenStaging.dpp'.
